name: ExtensionDocumentReference_DocStatus
title: R5: registered | partial | preliminary | final | amended | corrected | appended | cancelled | entered-in-error | deprecated | unknown
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DocumentReference.docStatus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DocumentReference.docStatus` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DocumentReference.docStatus` 0..1 `code`
*  R4B: `DocumentReference.docStatus` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `DocumentReference.docStatus` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DocumentReference.docStatus` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `DocumentReference.docStatus` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: registered | partial | preliminary | final | amended | corrected | appended | cancelled | entered-in-error | deprecated | unknown
element.comment:
Element `DocumentReference.docStatus` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `DocumentReference.docStatus` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The document that is pointed to might be in various lifecycle states.

element.short: registered | partial | preliminary | final | amended | corrected | appended | cancelled | entered-in-error | deprecated | unknown
element.definition: The status of the underlying document.
element.comment: The document that is pointed to might be in various lifecycle states.
